mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_role WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND id IN
#{roleId}

SELECT id, role_code AS roleCode, role_name AS roleName, status, sort, remark, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM admin_role WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.roleCode}, '%')
AND role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.roleName}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_role ( role_code, role_name, status, sort, remark, create_by, update_by ) VALUES ( #{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{status}, #{sort}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, role_code AS roleCode, role_name AS roleName, status, sort, remark, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, create_by AS createBy, update_by AS updateBy, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM admin_role WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_role SET role_name = #{dto.roleName}, status = #{dto.status}, sort = #{dto.sort}, remark = #{dto.remark}, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE admin_role SET status = #{status}, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
UPDATE admin_role SET is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_role WHERE id = #{roleId} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
